generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the motor shaft for position feedback"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder positioned behind the gearbox for position feedback"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring input current (IM) for permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance TorqueSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring torque output (τM) for the motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TorqueDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance TorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TorqueSensor
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLStructuralModelingEnabler, ACMEADLEnabler, AADLADLEnabler, MontiArcADLEnabler, SysMLIBDEnabler, MontiArcAutomatonEnabler, SysMLStateMachineEnabler, SimulinkEnabler, CppEnabler, JavaEnabler
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from gearbox encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLStructuralModelingEnabler, ACMEADLEnabler, AADLADLEnabler, MontiArcADLEnabler, SysMLIBDEnabler, MontiArcAutomatonEnabler, SysMLStateMachineEnabler, SimulinkEnabler, CppEnabler, JavaEnabler
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current measurement for permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, CppEnabler, JavaEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque output measurement for the motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, CppEnabler, JavaEnabler
]

instance SysMLStructuralModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) methodologies with SysML for structural modeling across requirements, functional, logical, and product layers"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionMonitoringService
]

instance RFLPMethodologyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RFLP methodology for complexity management in Digital Twin system"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionMonitoringService
]

instance OOSEMMethodologyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OOSEM methodology for complexity management in Digital Twin system"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionMonitoringService
]

instance SPESMethodologyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SPES methodology for complexity management in Digital Twin system"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionMonitoringService
]

instance SMArDTMethodologyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SMArDT methodology for complexity management in Digital Twin system"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionMonitoringService
]

instance ACMEADLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACME Architecture Description Language for component and connector architecture"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionMonitoringService
]

instance AADLADLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL Architecture Description Language for component and connector architecture"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionMonitoringService
]

instance MontiArcADLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Architecture Description Language for component and connector architecture"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionMonitoringService
]

instance SysMLIBDEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagrams for component and connector architecture"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionMonitoringService
]

instance MontiArcAutomatonEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton for behavioral modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionMonitoringService
]

instance SysMLStateMachineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML state machines for behavioral modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionMonitoringService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for analytical modeling and simulation of dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionMonitoringService, VisualizationService
]

instance CppEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ programming language for detailed dynamics simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionMonitoringService
]

instance JavaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java programming language for general-purpose integration"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance FrictionMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction in robotic systems to improve motion accuracy through real-time analytics"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionIdentification
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive dashboards and visualization tools for operational decision support"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalDecisionSupport
]

instance JointFrictionIdentification : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction in robotic systems to improve motion accuracy"
]

instance OperationalDecisionSupport : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operational decision support via interactive dashboards and visualization tools"
]

instance MABIMAX100Robot : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "MABI MAX 100 serial robot with six axes, where the first vertical axis is analyzed for joint friction"
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor with current input (IM) and torque output (τM)"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission system coupled with cycloidal gear for low gear ratio"
]

instance CycloidalGearMechanism : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gear mechanism for precise torque control"
]

instance RobotEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MABIMAX100Robot, PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGearMechanism
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin constellation follows the Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM) structured as a UML class diagram (Fig. 1), comprising Asset (physical entities), Model (subtypes: EngineeringModel, DataCalculationModel, SimulationModel), and Processing components responsible for data collection and transformation. This model establishes a one-way data flow from physical assets to digital representations without autonomous feedback mechanisms."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is validated through deviation analysis between simulated and measured data, specifically targeting friction loss detection in the robot's first axis. The system addresses limitations in existing friction models by incorporating continuous improvement methods for both white-box (physics-based) and black-box (data-driven) approaches during operation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol used for sensor data streaming; network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols not specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system adheres to industry standards including SysML [17] for Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE), ACME [23], AADL [24], MontiArc [25,26] for Architecture Description Languages (ADLs), and SysML Internal Block Diagrams (IBDs) [17,27], which enable standardized component & connector perspectives and interoperability across heterogeneous stakeholders and tools."
]
